# Asif Sayyed — Data Scientist Portfolio

> Data Scientist (Specialist - Data Science) at Marsh McLennan's Cyber Risk Intelligence Center, Mumbai, India. B.Sc. in Data Science & Business Analytics. Builder of ML tools, NLP engines, and open-source Python packages.

## About

Asif Sayyed is a Data Science Specialist at [Marsh McLennan](https://www.marshmclennan.com/)'s Cyber Risk Intelligence Center (CRIC), based in Mumbai, India. He holds a B.Sc. in Data Science & Business Analytics from the [School of Data Science and Business Intelligence (SDBI)](https://www.linkedin.com/school/sdbiofficial/), Mumbai University (2022–2025). His work spans cyber risk analytics, machine learning, NLP, computer vision, and building data-driven applications.

- Website -> https://sayyedasif.com
- Full AI-readable profile -> https://sayyedasif.com/llms-full.txt

## Skills

- **Programming & Databases:** Python, R, SQL, MongoDB, Scala
- **Data Wrangling:** Pandas, NumPy, Web Scraping
- **Data Analysis & Visualization:** Matplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly, Tableau, Power BI, Streamlit, GraphViz
- **Machine Learning:** Scikit-learn, XGBoost, StatsModels, Time Series
- **Deep Learning:** TensorFlow, PyTorch, Keras, NLP (NLTK, Spacy), Computer Vision (OpenCV)
- **Big Data:** PySpark, Databricks
- **Cloud & Automation:** AWS, Git, GitHub, Power Automate

## Blogs

- How Averages Deceive Us: The Math and Meaning of Simpson's Paradox -> https://sayyedasif.com/blogs/simpsons-paradox-how-averages-deceive-us/
- Building the Ship of Theseus: Visualizing Codebase Entropy -> https://sayyedasif.com/blogs/ship-of-theseus-codebase-entropy/
- Google Search Console & AI Search Best Practices for Developers -> https://sayyedasif.com/blogs/google-search-console-best-practices/
- Complete Guide to SEO, GEO, and AEO -> https://sayyedasif.com/blogs/seo-geo-aeo-guide/

## Projects

- Yoink -> https://github.com/Asifdotexe/yoink: A CLI tool and FastAPI backend to pack, sanitize, and visualize codebases for Large Language Models.
- Ship of Theseus -> https://github.com/Asifdotexe/Theseus: Software entropy visualizer tracking codebase decay and renewal using Python and D3.js.
- Second Brain -> https://github.com/Asifdotexe/second-brain: Knowledge base website built with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Python, and Markdown.
- LittleLogger -> https://github.com/Asifdotexe/LittleLogger: Machine Learning experiment tracker published on PyPI. Python, Scikit-learn.
- SERPENT -> https://github.com/Asifdotexe/SERPENT: Code-to-flowchart application using AST parsing, Graphviz, and Streamlit.
- MNISTify -> https://github.com/Asifdotexe/MNISTify: Digit recognition app using CNN and TensorFlow with a Streamlit interface.
- QuickVU -> https://github.com/Asifdotexe/QuickVU: No-code data cleaning and analysis tool built with Streamlit.
- DORA -> https://github.com/Asifdotexe/DORA: Automated exploratory data analysis report generator, published on PyPI.
- RecommendationHaki -> https://github.com/Asifdotexe/RecommendationHaki: Anime recommendation engine using NLP and content-based filtering.
- StoDir -> https://github.com/Asifdotexe/StoDir: Stock direction forecasting model using Scikit-learn and yfinance.
- PlateScribe -> https://github.com/Asifdotexe/PlateScribe: License plate detection and OCR tool using deep learning, OpenCV, and Pytesseract.
- Python vs Cython Benchmarking -> https://github.com/Asifdotexe/playground-repo/issues/9: Performance benchmarking analysis comparing Python and Cython.
- Natural LangWiz -> https://github.com/Asifdotexe/Natural-LangWiz: NLP learning repository covering natural language preprocessing techniques.
- Open See Wee -> https://github.com/Asifdotexe/open-see-wee: Computer vision learning repository using OpenCV.
- Amazon Sentiment Analysis -> https://github.com/Asifdotexe/nlp-sentimental-analysis-on-amazon-reviews: Sentiment scoring model on Amazon reviews using NLP.
- Real Estate Price Prediction -> https://github.com/Asifdotexe/real-estate-price-prediction: Price prediction model using Scikit-learn.
- AQA: Air Quality Analysis -> https://github.com/Asifdotexe/Air-Quality-Analysis-AQA: Air quality case study with data analysis and visualization.
- Flipkart Electric Scooter Analysis -> https://github.com/Asifdotexe/flipkart-electric-scooter-data-analysis: Web scraping and data analysis of Flipkart electric scooter listings.
- VBA Pathology Lab Application -> https://medium.com/@asifdotexe/how-we-used-vba-to-make-a-pathology-lab-application-45acb35e6abf: Pathology lab automation tool using Excel VBA and Macros.
- Covid-19 Dashboard -> https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/sayyed.asif/viz/Covid19Dashboard_16783477991420/Dashboard1: Interactive Tableau dashboard for COVID-19 data visualization.

## Experience

- **Specialist - Data Science** at Marsh McLennan (May 2025 – Present)
- **Graduate Trainee - Data Science** at Marsh McLennan (Dec 2023 – Dec 2024)

- **HSC (Science)** — Shree L.R. Tiwari Junior College (2019–2021)
- **SSC** — St. Xavier's High School (2009–2019)
